CustomField.formula: IF( OR(SalesPeriod__c - ThisPeriod__c = 1) ,IF (spot__c ,RemainingEstimateAmount__c ,IF (Month(occur_revenu_month__c) < 7 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (7- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (19- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12)) ,IF (spot__c, 0 ,RemainingEstimateAmount__c) )
CustomField.label: 来期売上想定額
